name: util_admin_contracts_overview_html
_purpose: Vista agregada de contratos del estudio. GET /webhook/admin-contracts-overview con header x-api-key. 5 KPI cards (total, draft, esperando firma, signed + amount 30d, expired sin marcar). Tabla por contract_type. Top 25 pendientes ordenados por urgency (expired=100, drafts>14d=80, sent>7d=60).
_complementa_a: cron_contract_followup (digest diario), agent_contracts (generacion via Google Doc)

nodes.name: Load Contracts Stats
nodes._query_summary: json con totals + by_type + pending_action con urgency CASE
